reapack.name: Afrodiaq - Trim Left Edge Under Mouse to Edit Cursor.lua
reapack.desc: Trim left edge of item under mouse cursor to edit cursor position and move region start if necessary

reapack.name: Afrodiaq - Trim Right Edge Under Mouse to Edit Cursor.lua
reapack.desc: Trim right edge of item under mouse cursor to edit cursor position and move region end if necessary

reapack.name: Xavier - Google Sheets Renamer.lua
reapack.desc: Rename selected media item and create a region with the clipboard content
